note: Directionless tape — attention is noisy and mean-reverts (the classic hype-without-volume trap). Exposure cut hard (multiplier 0.4); take only the single name whose trending climb is actually confirmed by money, small, and hold a large USDT reserve. Fade the loud-but-thin name. Fear & Greed 49 keeps the gate open.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 50, |median_24h_return| 0.1 < 1, fear_greed 49 neutral, no higher rule matched -> chop (directionless range)
computed.risk_budget_reason: (100 - target_stable_reserve 12) * 0.4 = 35.2; only the single money-confirmed attention name is taken small, the rest is USDT reserve to avoid attention whipsaw.

sentiment_scores.components: rank climb +8 CONFIRMED by volume_ratio 1.6 and positive social -> the one real attention move in a flat tape
loudest trending climb but volume_ratio 0.8 < 1.0 (HYPE WITHOUT VOLUME) and security penalty 0.40 -> faded, not chased

computed.attention_reason: In chop almost all attention is noise. SHIB has the loudest trending climb but it is HYPE WITHOUT VOLUME (volume_ratio 0.8) — exactly the trap this Skill fades. Only CAKE clears 0.65 with a trending climb CONFIRMED by a volume surge; it is taken at reduced size and the rest sits in the USDT reserve.

entry: Enter only assets with sentiment_score >= 0.65 AND a volume-confirmed trending climb; in chop cap entries to the 1-2 cleanest names and size down.
FADE hype without volume: reject any attention spike on volume_ratio < 1.5 (manufactured hype is fakeout-prone in a range).
Per-name weight capped at 17%; keep the bulk of the book in the USDT reserve.
exit: Trim/exit when sentiment_score < 0.50 on the next rebalance (the attention faded back into noise).
Exit immediately if volume_ratio drops below 1.0 while held (the money left, only hype remains).
Force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 22%; rotate to USDT on a risk_off transition.

actions.reason: sentiment_score 0.68; the only money-confirmed attention climb in a flat tape, taken small
sentiment_score 0.30 < 0.65: loud trending climb but volume_ratio 0.8 < 1.0 (hype without volume) + security penalty 0.40
sentiment_score 0.36 < 0.65: attention slipping, volume_ratio 0.9, social negative
